title: <div>$OS_ROOT/specs: master specifications such as this document, plus layer-spe
content:
$OS_ROOT/specs: master specifications such as this document, plus layer-specific specs (for example, VISION-META-SPEC-CANON-0001-v0_1 stored as a file here).

$OS_ROOT/worlds: high-level world registries and linking files referencing detailed assets in $ARCHIVE_ROOT and $REPO_ROOT.

$OS_ROOT/agents: descriptions of agent roles, their powers, and their interfaces to $AUTOMATION_ENGINE.

$OS_ROOT/meta: OS-level indices and summaries, including cross-layer maps.

SYSTEM-layer artifacts that alter structure must update $OS_ROOT/specs and, if necessary, include migration instructions that describe how existing archives and repos should be interpreted.

2.3 $ARCHIVE_ROOT Structure

$ARCHIVE_ROOT is an append-only memory substrate with structured directories:

$ARCHIVE_ROOT/sessions
$ARCHIVE_ROOT/worlds
$ARCHIVE_ROOT/characters
$ARCHIVE_ROOT/specs
$ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta

Sessions: logs of interactive runs with AIs or humans.
Worlds: consolidated world states across time.
context: From document: 0.	Preamble and Scope — chunk 10 (chunk 10/31)
